name: atomyx
description: Atomyx — Agentic Test Orchestration Module. Cross-platform mobile test framework driven by Claude (or any MCP client). Workspace root; end-user CLI ships from packages/cli as `atomyx`, MCP stdio server ships from packages/mcp as `atomyx-mcp`.
author: Solrum

scripts.build: (cd shared && npm run build) && for d in core driver driver-wire android-driver ios-driver ios-sim-driver skills script mcp sidecar cli; do (cd packages/$d && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npm run build) || exit 1; done
scripts.test: (cd shared && npm test) && for d in core driver driver-wire android-driver ios-driver ios-sim-driver skills script mcp sidecar cli; do (cd packages/$d && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npm test) || exit 1; done && (cd apps/studio && npm test)
scripts.test:all: (cd shared && npm test) && for d in core driver driver-wire android-driver ios-driver ios-sim-driver skills script mcp cli; do (cd packages/$d && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npm test) || exit 1; done && (cd apps/studio && npm test)
scripts.check:fast: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:prefix && npm run lint:phrases
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run depcruise && npm run lint:feature-api && npm run lint:prefix && npm run lint:phrases && npm run lint:doc-paths && npm run test && npm run coverage:check && npm run api:check && npm run wire:check && npm run audit && npm run license:check
scripts.release: changeset version && npm run check && changeset publish
